mapper.select: SELECT batch_id, batch_no, import_type, file_name, file_hash, total_count, success_count, error_count, field_mapping, validate_summary, status, operator_id, created_time, finished_time FROM data_import_batch ORDER BY created_time DESC, batch_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO data_import_batch ( batch_id, batch_no, import_type, file_name, file_hash, total_count, success_count, error_count, field_mapping, validate_summary, status, operator_id, created_time, finished_time ) VALUES ( (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(batch_id), 0) + 1 FROM data_import_batch), #{batch.batchNo}, #{batch.importType}, #{batch.fileName}, #{batch.fileHash}, #{batch.totalCount}, #{batch.successCount}, #{batch.errorCount}, #{batch.fieldMapping}, #{batch.validateSummary}, #{batch.status}, #{batch.operatorId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT tag_id AS "tagId", tag_code AS "tagCode", tag_name AS "name", tag_category AS "type", COALESCE(rule_expression, description) AS "condition", '规则引擎' AS "source", CASE WHEN enabled = 1 THEN '启用' ELSE '停用' END AS "status", description AS "description" FROM fund_tag ORDER BY tag_category, tag_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fund_tag ( tag_id, tag_code, tag_name, tag_category, description, rule_expression, enabled ) VALUES ( (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(tag_id), 0) + 1 FROM fund_tag), COALESCE(#{rule.tagCode}, CONCAT('CUSTOM_', (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(tag_id), 0) + 1 FROM fund_tag))), #{rule.name}, #{rule.type}, #{rule.description}, #{rule.condition}, CASE WHEN #{rule.status} = '停用' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END )
mapper.update: UPDATE fund_tag SET tag_name = COALESCE(#{rule.name}, tag_name), tag_category = COALESCE(#{rule.type}, tag_category), description = COALESCE(#{rule.description}, description), rule_expression = COALESCE(#{rule.condition}, rule_expression), enabled = CASE WHEN #{rule.status} = '停用' THEN 0 WHEN #{rule.status} = '启用' THEN 1 ELSE enabled END WHERE tag_id = #{tagId}
